race.comment: LOVE SHUCK (3) consistent gelding who nearly pinched the Wagga Town Plate three-back with a game second. Closed quickly with the 62.5kg when a gritty second over 1206m at Canberra Acton. Gets the right set-up for this and doesn't have to improve much to win this. TUSCANY (8) progressive gelding going quickly through the grades on the provincial circuit. Sat on the speed and showed plenty of heart to get the upper hand with the 60kg over 1200m at Kembla Grange. Has the early speed to hold a position and sure to be thereabouts. PERFECT PICTURE (10) was a month between runs when she went back from the wide gate with a battling eighth over 1300m at Warwick Farm. Kept ticking over since with a 1000m trial at Hawkesbury. Blinkers go on and can return to form quickly. ALPHARD (11) has returned in good order so must be respected.
